title: Lowe’s is fighting to prevent AI agent overload
description: Lowe’s is actively implementing AI to improve the customer shopping experience and to assist employees in asking difficult questions.

title: Reddit’s new shopping ads are a play for beauty brands’ business
description: This story was originally published on sister site, Glossy. Reddit is leaning further into shopping at a moment when beauty discovery is being reshaped by how consumers search, ask and validate information online. At Shoptalk 2026, the company introduced new tools tied to its Dynamic Product Ads business, including Collection Ads that combine lifestyle imagery […]

title: Media Briefing: Overheard at the Digiday Publishing Summit, March 2026 edition
description: With no sign of search traffic returning, publishers are doubling down on subscriptions to build direct reader revenue -- but it's not easy.

title: [AINews] The Biggest Claude Launch of All Time
description: We thought about this carefully before choosing hyperbole; but it is warranted.

title: I Review Routers for a Living. Don’t Buy a Router Right Now
description: The Federal Communications Commission bans the sale of new foreign-made routers in the US to protect national security. The ironic side effect: It could stop your current router from receiving vital security updates.

title: Today's NYT Mini Crossword Answers for Thursday, March 26
description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 26.

title: USPS 8% Surcharge Could Hit Small Businesses and Shoppers Alike
description: It's the first-ever surcharge from the USPS, and it's all due to rising gas costs. But it won't affect first-class stamps.

title: Ring Finally Goes Wire-Free for Its Latest 4K Video Doorbells
description: The launch of battery-powered versions of the company's powerful AI doorbells has been highly anticipated.

title: Melania Trump Escorted by Talking Humanoid Robot at White House Tech Summit
description: The first lady shared the spotlight with the robot to promote the use of artificial intelligence in education.

title: New Ecommerce Tools: March 25, 2026
description:
This week: updates on predictive intelligence, same-day shipping, automated marketing, agentic commerce, installment payments, product videos, and dropshipping.

title: Nordstrom to close 2 full-line stores despite top-line strength last year
description: Anchors at malls in Delaware and Texas will close this spring, but the off-price Rack fleet continues to grow, with plans to add 23 locations in 2026.

title: How Lowe’s creator network is winning over the next generation of shoppers
description: The home improvement retailer has partnered with content creators like MrBeast to connect with Gen Alpha long before they purchase their first home.

title: Walmart brings Sparky to ChatGPT as OpenAI rethinks Instant Checkout
description: OpenAI is pivoting away from handling purchases after its initial efforts failed to provide enough flexibility.

title: GLP-1 users are changing apparel trends
description: Some categories, like intimates, are already seeing shifts as shoppers buy clothes for new body sizes and routines, according to a Circana report.

title: On CEO’s ‘planned hiatus’ comes as a surprise
description: The sneaker brand is shaking up its C-suite again, less than a year after Martin Hoffmann took over as its sole chief executive.
